title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 26 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 26 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 26 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/04/2024
DCE iron ore continued to fluctuate in a day，and rise in the end;The main contract I2409 closed at 884.5. an increase of 0.06% throughout the day; Traders ship according to market conditions; Some traders have delivery requirements at the end of the month. The steel mills' inventory replenishment before the May Day holiday is nearing its end, with a noticeable decrease in inquiries.
